description: Take casual dressing to the next level with these leather slip-ons from timberland. Stylish to the hilt and an absolute comfort to the feet, it's a perfect addition to your wardrobe for those days at the lounge. Team this with chinos and simple shirts for that cool, casual look.UpperTwo-tone leather upper for that stylish look and comfort feelRugged stitch detailing at the seams of the toe box for style and durabilityCushioned collar for greater comfortTextile lining for greater comfortComplete inner fabric lining for breathable comfortFabric footbed for all-day comfort and sweat protectionBrand name on the heelMidsoleRubber midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with textured lugs shoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineDo not store in direct sunlight
